scene: Stan the round-headed dot-eyed stickman with a big thought bubble appearing out of a question-mark cloud over his head, flat soft blue background, huge bold black caps WHO SENT THAT? with a thick outline, high contrast.
Stan's round head with a little mail-slot in the forehead and a thought-letter sliding out of it, flat grey background, huge bold black caps YOU DIDN'T WRITE IT? with a thick outline, high contrast.
A brain sitting in a trash can next to a heart proudly on a pedestal, flat sandy tan background, huge bold black caps WRONG ORGAN? with a thick outline, high contrast.
